title: CAMS upgrades global air-quality forecast resolution
summary: The Copernicus Atmosphere Monitoring Service has upgraded its global forecasting system, improving resolution relevant to aviation and drone operations.
body: The latest CAMS upgrade improves the spatial resolution and accuracy of global atmospheric-composition forecasts, including aerosols, ozone and near-surface pollutants. Aviation meteorology and U-Space drone applications benefit from more precise hazard and air-quality information.
